name: Survive the femboy zombcats!
description:
nothing to release? alright. fuck it. i'll just..freshen up this bot and release it.

this was an idea i had for a while, just as a fun little idea. i think it works as a halloween bot.

anyways, your goal is to survive. as long as possible. there's a buncha different types of zombcats, most male, some female, coming after you. you get infected through sex, but you can also make money through killing or through sex. shop at the end of every wave. other players can appear, too, and help. have fun.

art by mermio.

epsilon worked on most of this.
creator: thE_onE
